text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the end of the year, and the Arima Kinen has
arrived. This year's winter Grand Prix brings
together T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto, two
runners at the forefront of their generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road was also selected to run in the
race. She steps into the paddock with her peers
amidst the roar of the audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But while T.M. Opera O finishes first and Meisho
Doto second, Narita Top Road winds up far
behind in ninth place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she will never give up. She smiles as she
expresses her intent to work harder than anyone
else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hearing this, Admire Vega tells Narita Top Road that she better meet her expectations as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like stars still visible in midday, the light of this
era's four stars shines on.
